header.name: Carlos Diego Simon Hurtado
header.subtitle: Full Stack Software Developer
header.description: I am an information systems engineering student specializing in the development of scalable, high-performance, user-centered interfaces. I work end-to-end on designing APIs, modeling business logic, and integrating systems, building robust solutions that replace manual processes and have a real impact on Fintech operations.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description:
Hello! My name is Carlos Diego Simon Hurtado, and I’m dedicated to building technological solutions that make a real impact on complex problems.
During the COVID-19 pandemic, I developed a web-based system for managing table tennis tournaments, which was used by various clubs to handle registrations and view competitions in real time. That experience shaped my approach: creating useful products, automating processes, and building scalable solutions.
I am currently studying Information Systems Engineering and work on developing backend systems, integrations, and process automation in complex environments, primarily within the fintech domain, where consistency, traceability, and scalability are essential.
On the technical side, I work on API-based architectures using Node.js and Java/Spring, designing business logic, integrations with external services, and data processing. Additionally, I incorporate language models (LLMs) as part of my development tooling for code generation, testing, debugging, documentation, and data analysis.

items.name: FullStack Software Developer
items.description: Development and maintenance of critical connections between the internal billing system, the headquarters in Taipei, and the regulations of the tax authority in Argentina. On a daily basis, I tackle integration challenges that involve the secure transmission of accurate data, ensuring compliance with legal and tax regulations.

items.name: Frontend Software Developer
items.description: Implementation of self-administered modules with React and Google App Scripts with high user traffic. Requirements analysis, planning and software maintenance, according to client needs.

items.name: Backend Software Developer
items.description: Performance improvements in the database access modules of the Sperta management software, incident resolution, documentation and report surveys.

items.name: SAIT Alvear Club
items.description: Automated Tournament Registration System with participant visualization and zone seeding using snake algorithm.
items.technologies: React, CSS, Google App Scripts, Google Sheets

items.name: Hideki Task Manager
items.description: Multi-user task manager with graphical visualization, user login, guest access and CRUD operations.
items.technologies: Vanilla JavaScript, Bootstrap, Chart JS, JSON

items.name: Ecommerce Lacroix Pattisier
items.description: E-commerce with product visualization, cart addition functionalities with stock control and purchase order generation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: 👉 If you're looking for a Software Developer | Full Stack (Frontend & Backend) with extensive knowledge of both back-end development and design, as well as their implementation in web development, please feel free to contact me via social media or email
